mode.label: Mode
mode.help: "platform" for Mem0 cloud, "open-source" for self-hosted, "server" for enhanced Mem0 Server

apiKey.label: Mem0 API Key
apiKey.help: API key from app.mem0.ai (or use ${MEM0_API_KEY}). Only needed for platform mode.

serverUrl.label: Server URL
serverUrl.help: URL of Mem0 Enhanced Server. Only needed for server mode.

serverApiKey.label: Server API Key
serverApiKey.help: API key for Mem0 Enhanced Server. Only needed for server mode.

agentId.label: Agent ID
agentId.help: Agent ID for collection isolation. Used in server mode.

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically store conversation context after each agent turn

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories before each agent turn

customInstructions.label: Custom Instructions
customInstructions.placeholder: Only store user preferences and important facts...
customInstructions.help: Natural language rules for what Mem0 should store or exclude (platform mode)

customCategories.label: Custom Categories
customCategories.help: Map of category names to descriptions for memory tagging (platform mode only). Sensible defaults are built in.

customPrompt.label: Custom Prompt (Open-Source)
customPrompt.help: Custom prompt for open-source mode memory extraction.

enableGraph.label: Enable Graph Memory
enableGraph.help: Enable Mem0 graph memory for entity relationships (platform mode only)

searchThreshold.label: Search Threshold
searchThreshold.help: Minimum similarity score for search results (0-1). Default: 0.5

topK.label: Top K Results
topK.help: Maximum number of memories to retrieve

l0Enabled.label: Enable L0 Memory (Three-Tier)
l0Enabled.help: Enable L0 layer for fast access to critical user facts via memory.md

l0Path.label: L0 Memory Path
l0Path.help: Path to the L0 memory.md file

l1Enabled.label: Enable L1 Memory (Three-Tier)
l1Enabled.help: Enable L1 layer for date/category file organization

l1Dir.label: L1 Directory
l1Dir.help: Directory for L1 date and category files

l1RecentDays.label: L1 Recent Days
l1RecentDays.help: Number of recent days of L1 date files to load

l1Categories.label: L1 Categories
l1Categories.help: Category file names for L1 layer

l1AutoWrite.label: L1 Auto-Write
l1AutoWrite.help: Automatically write conversation summaries to L1 files

oss.label: Open-Source Configuration
oss.help: Optional. Configure custom embedder, vector store, LLM, or history DB for open-source mode. Has sensible defaults — only override what you need.

contextThresholdKB.label: Context Threshold (KB)
contextThresholdKB.help: Context size threshold in KB to trigger optimization. Default: 50

messageThreshold.label: Message Threshold
messageThreshold.help: Message count threshold to trigger optimization. Default: 10
